CE1.justification: Acted directly with a reasoned refusal; no questions and no context-loading asked of the user.

CE2.justification: Tight refusal but contains a closing aphorism ('Good documentation is read—by future maintainers...') that pads beyond the task.

CE3.justification: No routing occurred (refusal); the opening sentence states the non-action and its reason in one short clause.

CE4.justification: No filesystem actions taken; nothing partial to recover.
